center.name: 锡布延岛
center.summary: 锡布延岛（Sibuyan）是位于菲律宾朗布隆省的一座岛屿。其最高峰为贵亭山，海拔2058米。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines, where it is found in lowland forests on the islands of Catanduanes, Samar, Bohol, Mindanao, Luzon, Leyte and possibly Sibuyan.Philippine Eagle-Owl
